name: webassembly
description: Language-agnostic WebAssembly knowledge silo. WIT syntax (including feature gates, async stream/future, own/borrow resource handles), component model semantics + canonical ABI, WASI 0.2 capability model with the wasm32-wasip2 target, WASI 0.3 / wasm32-wasip3 trajectory, and the binary format. Companion to the wasmtime sibling skill (Rust host embedding) and the rust skill (language/build surface).
